title: Integrate non-blocking readerThread and locks from LICHEN SX1262.cs into extracted version
description: Port readerThread, stateLock, connectionLock, writeLock, rxOneShot, latchedIrqFlags, async handling from lichen/boards/renode/peripherals/SX1262.cs into .extraction/.../SX1262.cs. Preserve loopbackMode. Protect ALL state changes (irqFlags, rxMode, buffers, IRQ/Busy) with locks. Update EnterRxModeBridge to be non-blocking (reader handles async). Update Reset/FinishTransmission/Transmit/OnGPIO/GetStatus etc for locks. Ensure loopback works with one-shot RX logic. No dead code.
close_reason: Critical fixes implemented, non-blocking integrated preserving loopback, tested, compiles, README updated. No dead code.
